title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0403
summary: Sumit Kumar, aged 17 years and 11 months at the time of offence, was accused of murdering a 67-year-old woman during a robbery in 2016. He allegedly entered her house on the pretext of asking for water, hit her with a steel pan, smothered her, and robbed her valuables.
